name: exa
description: 使用 Exa.ai API 进行高质量的互联网搜索。需要 EXA_API_KEY 环境变量。
capabilities: Search the web using Exa.ai neural search API
Return search results as structured JSON output
Configure search with neural search type
author: Dwsy
securitySummary: Simple Exa.ai API wrapper that reads only the EXA_API_KEY environment variable and makes outbound API calls to Exa.ai for search functionality. All 48 static findings are false positives triggered by documentation code blocks and legitimate API key usage patterns. No command execution, no unauthorized network access, no data exfiltration.
valueStatement: Finding accurate, up-to-date information online can be time-consuming. The Exa skill uses neural search technology to deliver high-quality, relevant web results through simple API calls.
limitations: Requires EXA_API_KEY environment variable to be set
No local caching or history of searches
Depends on external Exa.ai service availability

useCases.title: Find recent papers
useCases.description: Search for academic papers and research findings on specific topics

useCases.title: Look up documentation
useCases.description: Find technical documentation and programming resources online

useCases.title: Verify facts online
useCases.description: Search for current information to fact-check and support content

promptTemplates.title: Basic search
promptTemplates.prompt: Use Exa to search for information about [topic]

promptTemplates.title: Technical search
promptTemplates.prompt: Search Exa for [programming topic] documentation and tutorials

promptTemplates.title: News search
promptTemplates.prompt: Search Exa for news about [event] from the past week

promptTemplates.title: Deep research
promptTemplates.prompt: Use Exa to find detailed information on [specific topic] including recent developments

bestPractices: Store your EXA_API_KEY securely in environment variables
Set EXA_API_KEY before running searches to avoid errors
Review search results for accuracy and relevance
antiPatterns: Do not hardcode API keys in scripts or share them publicly
Do not make excessive searches that could exhaust API quotas
Do not rely on search results without verification

faq.question: Is Exa compatible with all Claude versions?
faq.answer: Yes, the Exa skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through standard API calls.

faq.question: How many results does each search return?
faq.answer: Default is 5 results. You can configure this parameter when making API calls.

faq.question: Can I use Exa with other search tools?
faq.answer: Yes, Exa can be combined with other skills for comprehensive research workflows.

faq.question: Is my search data sent anywhere?
faq.answer: Search queries are sent to Exa.ai API. Review their privacy policy for data handling details.

faq.question: Why am I getting authentication errors?
faq.answer: Ensure EXA_API_KEY is set in your environment variables before running searches.

faq.question: How does Exa compare to regular search engines?
faq.answer: Exa uses neural search for more relevant results based on meaning rather than keywords.
